follow_on_debt: Only revisit scoped-out runners if the freeze scope later expands to require raw debug/runtime parity.

mainline_runtime_runners.reason: Shared GPU baseline runner that now defaults to direct bench reuse and underpins late-family gate reruns.
Rule-guided GPU orchestrator in the frozen packet; defaults to reuse and device-aware batching.
Tier-2 A/B/C medium-design runner retained as part of the frozen rule evidence; flows B/C default to reuse.
VeeR late-family gate runner retained in final packet scope and now defaults to reuse for gpu_cov_gate.
XuanTie late-family gate runner retained in final packet scope and now reaches direct_bench_kernel on warm reruns.
OpenTitan slice baseline family is part of the frozen packet and lands on cached_bundle_kernel with warm cache hits.
Low-level OpenTitan slice sweep chokepoint now carries device-aware batching policy.
Low-level OpenTitan slice campaign chokepoint now carries device-aware batching policy.
Backend-compare runner now reuses cached bundles and remains part of the OpenTitan control-plane selection flow.
Plan generator for backend compare; kept because the compare runner depends on its cached-bundle plan outputs.

rationale: The frozen rule packet already includes reuse, cached-bundle, and device-aware batching evidence for the runners that affect mainline validation.
The remaining direct paths are debug/raw helpers or Tier-0 CPU-only artifacts and do not block the scope-limited frozen rule family.

scoped_out_runners.reason: Directly reruns an existing _execute/cmd with extra debug plusargs; it does not participate in the frozen packet or runtime-default stack.
Raw simulator bring-up/debug helper for obj_dir/Vsim execution; intentionally outside the mainline baseline/cached-bundle path.
Tier-0 CPU-only harness artifact used to anchor the smallest repeatable RTLMeter case, not part of the GPU runtime rollout.
